headline: ZBRA Q1 Deep Dive: Automation and AI Drive Broad-Based Growth, Memory Supply Managed
summary: Enterprise data capture company Zebra Technologies (NASDAQ:ZBRA) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 14.3% year on year to $1.50 billion. Guidance for next quarter’s revenue was better than expected at $1.49 billion at the midpoint, 1.7% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.75 per share was 11.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Is Up 14.7% After Raising 2026 Guidance And Accelerating Buybacks - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Earlier this week, Zebra Technologies reported past first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$1,495 million and broadly stable earnings, while also completing roughly US$1.00 billion of share repurchases under its 2022 authorization and US$241.84 million under its 2026 program. The company also raised its full-year 2026 sales growth outlook and upgraded adjusted earnings guidance, signalling management’s confidence following stronger-than-expected quarterly performance and recent...
